default.toml.label: [Default]
default.toml.description: The default configuration for a cliff-notes playground.

cliff-notes.toml.label: Cliff Notes
cliff-notes.toml.description: The configuration used directly by cliff-notes to generate changelogs.

cliff-notes-remote.toml.label: Cliff Notes (Remote)
cliff-notes-remote.toml.description: A configuration that for works for any remote.

git-cliff-default.toml.label: git-cliff Default
git-cliff-default.toml.description: The default configuration defined by git-cliff itself, which can be used as a base for custom configurations.

github.toml.label: GitHub
github.toml.description: A configuration tailored for GitHub repositories, with sensible defaults for typical GitHub projects.

azure-devops-keepachangelog.toml.label: Azure DevOps (Keep a Changelog)
azure-devops-keepachangelog.toml.description: A configuration designed for Azure DevOps repositories, following the 'Keep a Changelog' format.

cocogitto.toml.label: Cocogitto
cocogitto.toml.description: A configuration based on the recommended settings for Cocogitto, a popular changelog generator.

detailed.toml.label: Detailed
detailed.toml.description: A configuration that includes detailed commit information, such as commit hashes, authors, and dates.

github-keepachangelog.toml.label: GitHub (Keep a Changelog)
github-keepachangelog.toml.description: A configuration that combines GitHub-specific formatting with the 'Keep a Changelog' style.

keepachangelog.toml.label: Keep a Changelog
keepachangelog.toml.description: A configuration that strictly follows the 'Keep a Changelog' format, suitable for projects that want to adhere to this popular changelog standard.

minimal.toml.label: Minimal
minimal.toml.description: A configuration that generates a minimalistic changelog, focusing on just the commit messages without additional metadata.

scoped.toml.label: Scoped
scoped.toml.description: A configuration that organizes commits into scopes based on their types or other criteria, providing a structured changelog.

scopesorted.toml.label: Scope Sorted
scopesorted.toml.description: A configuration that sorts commits within their scopes, making it easier to read and understand the changes in each section.

statistics.toml.label: Statistics
statistics.toml.description: A configuration that includes statistical information about the commits, such as the number of commits per type or scope.

unconventional.toml.label: Unconventional
unconventional.toml.description: A configuration that generates a changelog without strictly following the Conventional Commits specification, allowing for more flexibility in commit message formats.
